hooks.command: FILE=$(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c); process.stdin.on('end',()=>{ const o=JSON.parse(d); process.stdout.write((o.tool_input||{}).file_path||''); })"); [[ "$FILE" == *finance-tracker* ]] && cd "C:/Users/Gowtham/Desktop/finance-tracker" && git add -A && git commit -m "auto: update $(basename \"$FILE\")" && git push origin main 2>/dev/null || true
